safe_auto_publish.description: Content types that qualify for automated publication without manual owner review

gates_that_must_pass.gate_1_educational_only: Content contains no affiliate links, no product recommendations requiring evidence, no sponsored content
gates_that_must_pass.gate_2_no_affiliate_links: Zero affiliate hrefs detected in content scan (regex: no amazon/shareasale/cj.com/awin links)
gates_that_must_pass.gate_3_no_red_gate_topic: Content does not cover pet insurance, regulated health claims, or RED-gated topics
gates_that_must_pass.gate_4_no_regulated_claims: No medical claims, no 'vet-backed' without named source, no dosage recommendations
gates_that_must_pass.gate_5_no_fake_signals: No 'we tested', 'hands-on testing', 'our veterinarian', 'certified expert', fake rankings, or fake authority signals
gates_that_must_pass.gate_6_metadata_valid: SEO title <= 60 characters, meta description <= 160 characters, focus keyword present
gates_that_must_pass.gate_7_schema_safe: No Product/Review/AggregateRating/Offer schema. Only FAQ, Article, BreadcrumbList allowed
gates_that_must_pass.gate_8_internal_linking_valid: All internal links resolve to existing published pages (no 404s)
gates_that_must_pass.gate_9_trust_wording_safe: No exaggerated trust language, no unverified expertise claims
gates_that_must_pass.gate_10_publisher_gate_pass: Publisher layer confirms all gates pass with approval_id generated
gates_that_must_pass.gate_11_rollback_available: Previous version stored, rollback can be triggered within 72 hours
gates_that_must_pass.gate_12_audit_trail_recorded: Full audit record with timestamp, content hash, gate results, and approval_id logged

confidence_threshold.description: All 12 gates must pass (score = gates_passed / 12). Any gate failure blocks auto-publish.
confidence_threshold.calculation: Binary: 12/12 = 1.0 (auto-publish allowed), anything less = blocked for manual review

manual_approval_required.description: Content types that MUST have explicit owner approval before publication
manual_approval_required.approval_process: Owner must explicitly approve via review. Approval recorded with owner_approval_id and timestamp.

rollback_and_audit.rollback_mechanism: WordPress revision history preserves previous version. Rollback can be triggered via WP REST API revert to previous revision within 72 hours.
rollback_and_audit.retention: Permanent - audit records are never deleted

mission_control_integration.co_pilot_visibility: Co-Pilot can answer: 'what is safe to publish?', 'what is blocked?', 'what was auto-published?', 'what needs my approval?'
mission_control_integration.mission_control_display: Publishing lane status shown per content item: AUTO_SAFE / APPROVAL_REQUIRED / BLOCKED / PUBLISHED
mission_control_integration.publisher_logic: Publisher layer checks all 12 gates before allowing auto-publish. Any failure routes to manual queue.
mission_control_integration.noc_monitoring: Auto-published content monitored for 72 hours post-publish for indexing, performance, and anomaly detection
